title: EN 1992-1-1:2004 Punching Shear Design
description: Check slab punching shear in accordance with EN 1992-1-1:2004

shape.description: Column Shape. Symbol: shape. Shape of column.

c_type.description: Column Type. Symbol: C_{type}. Type of column.

D.description: Column Diameter (D). Symbol: D. Units: mm. Diameter of column.

C_y.description: Column Dimension (Cy). Symbol: c_y. Units: mm. Column dimension along axis y.

C_z.description: Column Dimension (Cz). Symbol: c_z. Units: mm. Column dimension along axis z.

h.description: Slab Thickness (h). Symbol: h. Units: mm. Overall slab thickness.

c.description: Clear Cover (c). Symbol: c. Units: mm. Clear cover to the reinforcement.

fywk.description: Yield Strength (fywk). Symbol: f_{ywk}. Units: MPa. Characteristic yield strength of steel of punching shear reinforcement.

pr_type.description: Punching Region. Symbol: PR_{type}. Type of punching region.

shear_type.description: Shear Reinforcment. Symbol: Shear_{type}. Type of punching shear reinforcement.

pattern.description: Reinforcement Pattern. Symbol: Pattern. Pattern of punching shear reinforcement.

Sr.description: Radial Spacing (Sr). Symbol: S_{r}. Units: mm. Radial spacing between perimeter of punching shear reinforcement.

d_bs.description: Shear Reinforcement Diameter (dbs). Symbol: d_{bs}. Units: mm. Diameter of shear reinforcement.

nr.description: Number of Rails (nr). Symbol: n_{r}. Number of rails.

n.description: Number of Studs (n). Symbol: n. Number of studs on each rail.

alpha.description: Angle (α). Symbol: α. Units: °. Angle between shear reinforcement and the beam axis perpendicular to the shear force (α=90° for typical perpendicular shear reinforcement).

d_by.description: Tensile Reinforcement Diameter (dby). Symbol: d_{by}. Units: mm. Diameter of tensile reinforcement along y direction.

s_y.description: Tensile Reinforcement Spacing (sy). Symbol: s_{y}. Units: mm. Spacing of tensile reinforcement along y direction.

sigma_cy.description: Mean Axial Stress (σcy). Symbol: σ_{cy}. Units: MPa. Mean axial stress along y direction due to loading or pre-stressing (compression positive).

d_bz.description: Tensile Reinforcement Diameter (dbz). Symbol: d_{bz}. Units: mm. Diameter Of tensile reinforcement along z direction.

s_z.description: Tensile Reinforcement Spacing (sz). Symbol: s_{z}. Units: mm. Spacing of tensile reinforcement along z direction.

sigma_cz.description: Mean Axial Stress (σcz). Symbol: σ_{cz}. Units: MPa. Mean axial stress along z direction due to loading or pre-stressing (compression positive).

alpha_cc.description: Coefficient (αcc). Symbol: α_{cc}. Coefficient taking account of long term effects and loading effects on the compressive strength of concrete (for shear).

k_max.description: Effectiveness Limit (kmax). Symbol: k_{max}. Effectiveness limit of punching shear reinforcement as a factor of the punching shear capacity of concrete alone. Default kmax = 1.5.

calc_method.description: Calculation Method (β). Symbol: β. Calculation method for the coefficient β accounting for increased shear forces due to eccentric loading.

P_ed.description: Upward Pressure from Soil (PEd). Symbol: P_{Ed}. Units: kN/m^2. Upward pressure from soil excluding self-weight of slab.

V_ed.description: Vertical Shear (VEd). Symbol: V_{Ed}. Units: kN. Design value of the vertical shear force transmitted from slab to column.

M_edz.description: Bending Moment (MEdz). Symbol: M_{Edz}. Units: kN.m. Design value of the bending moment transmitted from slab to the column (resultant vector) for bending about direction z-z (eccentricity along z axis).

M_edy.description: Bending Moment (MEdy). Symbol: M_{Edy}. Units: kN.m. Design value of the bending moment transmitted from slab to the column (resultant vector) for bending about direction y-y (eccentricity along y axis).

gamma_c.description: Concrete (ϒc). Symbol: ϒ_{c}. Concrete partial material safety factor.

gamma_s.description: Steel (ϒs). Symbol: ϒ_{s}. Reinforcement steel partial material safety factor.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
